home.title: ToolsJam
home.subtitle: Free online calculation tools and converters — multilingual, fast, and ad-free where you need them.
home.description: With ToolsJam you can run accurate calculations, convert units, and tackle academic, professional, or everyday tasks. Built for speed, clarity, and accessibility on every device.

category.math_desc: Algebra, calculus, geometry, and computational tools for everyday and advanced math.
category.physic_desc: Mechanics, thermodynamics, electromagnetism, and wave-motion calculators.
category.chemistry_desc: Molarity, pH, stoichiometry, and lab tools for chemistry students and professionals.
category.biology_desc: Genetics, ecology, cellular biology, and bioinformatics calculators.
category.statistic_desc: Probability, regression, hypothesis testing, and descriptive statistics tools.
category.finance_desc: Loans, interest, investments, taxes, and budgeting calculators.
category.health_desc: BMI, nutrition, fitness, dosage, and wellness calculators.
category.conversion_desc: Unit, currency, time-zone, and measurement converters.
category.construction_desc: Materials, dimensions, load, and project-cost calculators for construction.
category.other_desc: General-purpose tools that don't fit any single category.
